LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.EnableDia: When RimTalk is active, skip RimMind-Dialogue's redundant triggers to avoid duplicate conversations
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.SkipChitc: Skip RimMind's Chitchat dialogue triggers when RimTalk is active
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.SkipAutoD: Skip RimMind's auto dialogue triggers when RimTalk is active
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.SkipPlaye: Remove RimMind's "Chat with X" float menu option when RimTalk is active
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.ForceRimM: Keep RimMind's float menu option even when skipping player dialogue, allowing both chat systems to coexist
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.EnableCon: Push RimMind's data into RimTalk's prompt system as variables and prompt entries
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.PushPerso: Register RimMind personality profiles as RimTalk template variables (e.g. {{p.rimmind_personality}})
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.PushStory: Register storyteller narrative records as RimTalk environment variables
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.PushMemor: Register colonist memory records as RimTalk pawn variables
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.PushAdvis: Register advisor action history as RimTalk pawn variables
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.PushShapi: Register player shaping history as RimTalk pawn variables
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.InjectPer: Append personality description directly into RimTalk's Traits context section (may duplicate with personality variable)
Append AI narrative directly into RimTalk's Mood context section
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.EnableCon: Pull dialogue history and other data from RimTalk, registering as RimMind context providers
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimTalk.Settings.PullRimTa: Register RimTalk's dialogue history as RimMind's context provider, so RimMind can read past RimTalk conversations
